expectations.text: Configures -np for multiple concurrent users (4 or 5)
expectations.evidence: Uses '-np 5' matching team size, explains each user gets a dedicated slot

expectations.text: Recommends KV cache quantization since parallel sequences multiply memory usage
expectations.evidence: Uses '-ctk q8_0 -ctv q8_0' with explanation that 5 parallel slots each need own KV cache
All three present: -ngl 99, --no-mmap, ROCBLAS_USE_HIPBLASLT=1 with detailed explanations for each

expectations.text: Mentions monitoring, systemd service, or health endpoint for production stability
expectations.evidence: Provides full systemd unit file, /health endpoint, /metrics for Prometheus, rocm-smi monitoring, LimitMEMLOCK=infinity
